name: Port & Blue Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the bread flour and water. Mix until no dry spots remain.
2. Add sugar, salt, butter, port wine, blue cheese, walnuts, and applesauce to the dough. Stir until well incorporated.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let it rest for 1 hour (rapid-rise yeast) or 4 hours (active-dry yeast).
4. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
5. Let the dough rise again until doubled in size, about 1 hour at room temperature or 30 minutes in a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C).
6. Preheat your oven according to the manufacturer's instructions.
7. Bake the bread for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
8. Remove from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack before slicing.
